complete_areas: Refined static BAT/CMD parsing separates launchers, interpreters, scripts, URLs, shell references, checks, diagnostics, file operations, and control flow
Reference-line evidence is deterministically sharded with per-file coverage so one early file cannot suppress later-file evidence
V1A-2 symbol, import, setting, reference, code, source-hash, and known-good evidence is preserved and provenance-checked
not_collected_areas: Runtime execution, sys.path, imports at runtime, processes, services, open ports, scheduled tasks, event logs, signatures, shortcuts, models, and repairs
partial_areas: Per-file reference lines remain bounded to 5000 nonblank noncomment lines and report omissions explicitly
Dynamic delayed expansion, arbitrary batch subroutines, registry-derived paths, and runtime shell behavior remain unverified
PowerShell parsing is conservative and records only explicit static invocation forms
